The humanitarian aid trickling into Gaza falls far short of meeting basic needs, according to Dr Mohammed Abu Afash, director of Palestinian Medical Relief Society in Gaza. Speaking to Al Jazeera, Abu Afash said: “The aid entering Gaza is not enough to feed one percent of the Strip’s population.” He warned that malnutrition cases continue to surge while many types of food have been unavailable for months. “The amount of clean water in the Gaza Strip does not meet the needs of the population,” he added, noting that the health system has collapsed under pressure and disease is now spreading rapidly. He called for urgent humanitarian corridors to safely deliver supplies to those in need. On Monday the Palestinian Health Ministry reported that at least five adults have died from hunger or malnutrition in the last 24 hours, as Israel continues to restrict aid. This raises the total number of hunger-related deaths in the territory to 180, including 93 children, according to the ministry.

Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich on the occupation and destruction of Gaza: “We are finally going to occupy the Gaza Strip. We will stop being afraid of the word ‘occupation.’” “Once as we occupy and stay [in Gaza] we can talk about sovereignty [there]. But I did not demand that this be included among the goals of the war. First, we will defeat Hamas and prevent it from existing.” “There will be no retreat from the territories we have conquered, not even in exchange for hostages.” “Within a few months, we will be able to declare that we have won. Gaza will be totally destroyed.” “The population of Gaza, some 2.3 million Palestinians, would be ‘concentrated’ in a narrow strip of land between the Egyptian border and the so-called Morag Corridor, which runs the width of Gaza between Khan Younis and the border city of Rafah. The rest of the Strip... ‘will be empty.’” “Gaza will be entirely destroyed.” These statements were made in early May 2025 during public conferences and interviews, and have been widely reported and condemned both domestically and internationally.

You speak of light ️, of freedom’s call ️, Yet guard the hands that darken all . You send the gold, you send the might , Believing your cause is always right ️. But truth is more than one tale told, It’s the cries of the young and the old . You dream in stripes and stars , red, white, and blue , But the mirror shows the world’s view too . The ocean’s roar will carry the cries , Through winds that cut like ancient sighs ️. No wall so tall, no tower so grand, Can hide injustice from the world’s hand . Like Rome ️ that fell when pride was crowned, Like empires lost when truth was found … 🇪🇬 Egypt will stand — the Final Gate , Where justice speaks and ends the hate ️.
